changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Miko Outfits 101"

TextENGNew: ``Incidentally, there's something I would like to confirm with you, Riku.``
``W-whad iz ed... Haryuu~``

``Please stop acting like you got mauled by a boar!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3003. What is with those bandages? You didn't even get a scratch.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3004. Are you insinuating something about me?!``
I violently ripped off the bandages covering Riku's whole body after saying that... Just as I suspected, he didn't even have a single scrape on him.
``Oops~, guess the secret's out, huh?@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3003. I thought that you would get a little worried about me if I appeared so gravely injured.``
``Please do not belittle me!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3006. I know I was driven just a little by fury, but I made sure to hold back all the same!``
...However, I went too far and ended up damaging his bone tissue in spite of that, so I ordered some medicine from Ryuun-Ohc in secret.
As a result, unlike usual, it was extremely awkward when I asked her for it.
Her speech and conduct felt unusually barefaced when she gave me the medicine... but I think it only felt that way because of how overly suspicious I was... That's what I want to think, anyway.
I shelved all of that into a corner of my mind for now, loudly cleared my throat, and turned to Riku.
``So, what did you want to ask?``
``R-right...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3010. In the first place, I haven't heard the reason why you are so fixated on miko outfits.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3011. So I was hoping I could ask you about it.``
``Will you wear a miko outfit if I tell you?``
``...That depends on what I hear.``
I deliberately ignored the twitching vein in my temple as I turned to Riku with a forced smile.
It's true that while he did recommend those clothes (if you can even call them that) to me, I regret bursting into rage so carelessly against a human.
Besides... if he's so attached to them, perhaps they remind him of his mother or some woman he looks up to.
Based on all my interactions with him so far, I believe Riku actually is quite considerate and serious, despite his seemingly carefree exterior.
So I'm starting to think... there may be more to him recommending those scandalous customized miko outfits than a simple hobby.
``Do those miko outfits remind you of someone?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3014. Like your mother, or...``
``Oh no, not at all.@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3007. I don't even remember my mother to begin with.``
``I am not sure if I already told you this, but my real parents both died when I was little... In other words, I was adopted by my current father and bear no relation to him.``
``And his wife had already passed away by the time he took me in... so I grew up without a mother.``
``...Is that right?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3016. I'm sorry for carelessly digging up old wounds.``
Even I knew that inquiring into his family affairs was a rude and inconsiderate act, so I honestly apologized.
What is this feeling?
It's like something's tugging at a corner of my heart... but why?
``...Hanyuu?``
``Huh? Oh, I'm sorry...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3018. In that case, just why is it you are so fixated on miko outfits...?``
``Well... there are indeed a variety of reasons.@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3012. But if I had to say, the biggest one is...``
``Is what?``
``Because I love miko outfits.``
What. WHAT.
``...I see.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3022. By the way, Riku.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3023. I have another question for you.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3024. Do you prefer torture by fire, water, earth, or fists...?``
``P-please wait a minute!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3015. A-all I did was answer your question honestly, didn't I?!``
``Heheh... Riku?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3026. It would seem I misjudged you.``
``I thought you were a little more rational, reasonable... and worthy of listening to. That's why I allowed you to put me, of all people... me, of all people, through that total humiliation...``
``Heheheheheh, uheheheheheheheheheheheheheheh...!``
``Ha, hahaha... H-Hanyuu...?!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3017. Umm, your smile is a little... no, very... no, extremely frightening...!``
``Come on out to the garden... Riku.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3030. For the first time...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3031. in a really long while...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3032. I may have snapped just a little...♪``

``N-n-n-n-n-n-n-n-n-no, no, no, Hanyuu?!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3019. You've got the wrong idea!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3020. I wasn't trying to insult you, by no means!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3021. That's right! I swear to God that was not my intention at all!``
``Oh... oh really nooooow...?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3034. Then why did you have those miko outfits made as such incomprehensible and shameless perversions...?!``

``W-well...@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3023. When I had them made, I was thinking about how I wanted to see that work of beauty I once glimpsed at the swamp one more time.@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3024. And so I got carried away...``

``You got carried away...?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3036. That's even worse...!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3037. You're trying to make me, the god of this village, into the subject of your perverse and indecent hobby...? Unforgivable! Inexcusable!``
``You'll be going to Hell just like that old king from the mainland who tried to set his guardian deity up as his mistressssssssss!!!``

``Now get this through your head, Riku!!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3040. So long as you refuse to abandon such wicked thoughts, I will never, ever wear one of your customized miko outfits!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3041. Just wake up already!!``
``A-at this rate, I think I'm going to pass out, not wake up...@k@|@y@vS20/46/VTT_riku3026. Ghah...!``

``A-anyway!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3043. If you're so desperate to have me wear a miko outfit, please at least bring me one that is proper and adheres to common sense, one with no adjustments whatsoever!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3044. Is that clear?!``
``Agh, ow, ow...!@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3028. Th-then you'll wear one if I make you a normal one...?``
``I... I'll only consider it!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3046. Though the possibility of me having a change of heart in this matter is as infinitesimally low as the odds I would marry you!``
Though I was only giving an example of an absolute impossibility... when I realized what I'd unintentionally blurted out, I grew just as speechless as Riku.
Wh-what the hell kind of nonsense am I blurting?!
``U-umm, Hanyuu?``
``?!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3049. Th-this conversation is over!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3050. I'll go and clean the garden, so you get to work on making lunch right away!!``
I looked away to hide my flushed face, and quickly left the living room.
...My heart was pounding so fiercely that it nearly broke out of my chest.
Anyway, I'll go outside and get some fresh air to cool my head and my face off... It was with that thought that I made a break for the highest point on the grounds at top speed.
``...@k@vS20/46/VTT_riku3032. Hanyuu...``
